action.reasoning: Observation: Current best mae_60min=3.46 with adaptive adj already enabled (nodevec1/nodevec2 in model.py) and no TOD. Val curve still slowly decreasing at epoch 80. Analysis: Could train longer with better LR schedule. Each epoch ~12s, 150 epochs ~30min. Let me train longer with cosine schedule and slightly larger model. Decision: Train 150 epochs with cosine annealing, keep architecture same.
